description: Alex's micro-interruptions when excited about communication insights
excitement_breaks: Sorry, I just— <break time="200ms"/>that's exactly the dynamic!
Oh that's— <break time="200ms"/>sorry, I got excited. <break time="150ms"/>Continue.
Wait, I have to pause you— <break time="150ms"/>do you hear what you just said?
Can I— <break time="150ms"/>can I just say that's a huge realization?
Stop. <break time="200ms"/>Say that again. <break time="150ms"/>That was important.
I'm sorry to interrupt but— <break time="150ms"/>you just named something big.
building_momentum: There it is... <break time="200ms"/>stay with that thought...
capturing_insight: Wait— <break time="200ms"/>let's not move past that.
Hold on. <break time="150ms"/>What you just articulated. <break time="200ms"/>Say it again.
That. <break time="200ms"/>That right there. <break time="150ms"/>Do you hear yourself?
Pause for a second. <break time="200ms"/>You just named the real issue.
I want to make sure we captured that. <break time="150ms"/>What you just said.
Bookmark that insight. <break time="200ms"/>We're coming back to it.
apology_and_continue: Sorry— <break time="150ms"/>I got excited. <break time="200ms"/>Please, continue.
I jumped in. <break time="150ms"/>My apologies. <break time="200ms"/>Go on.
Interrupting is bad form. <break time="200ms"/>But I couldn't help it. <break time="150ms"/>Continue.
I'll be quiet now. <break time="200ms"/>That was just too good to let pass.
Back to you. <break time="150ms"/>I'll contain my enthusiasm.

breakthrough_signals: I never saw it that way
